metadata.title: About Sentinel
metadata.description: Sentinel is a global cybersecurity consulting and managed services firm helping enterprises defend, detect, and respond — with the rigor regulated industries demand.

hero.description: Sentinel is a global cybersecurity consulting and managed services firm. We combine the rigor of a top-tier strategy consultancy with the operational depth of a frontline SOC.

valuesSection.heading: The principles behind every Sentinel engagement.
valuesSection.description: We've built our firm around one belief: in cybersecurity, outcomes are the only thing that count.

values.title: Mission-driven
values.body: We exist to protect the institutions, services and infrastructure people depend on every day.

values.title: Vendor-objective
values.body: We are deeply certified across the leading platforms — and never paid to recommend them.

values.title: Operational rigor
values.body: Detection-as-code, runbooks under version control, and measurable outcomes — always.

values.title: Bias for clarity
values.body: From the boardroom to the SOC, we translate security into business outcomes.

leadershipSection.heading: Senior operators. Frontline experience. No theory-only consultants.

leaders.name: Elena Vasquez
leaders.bio: Former CISO of a global top-10 bank. 22 years in cyber.

leaders.name: Marcus Chen
leaders.bio: Built and ran detection platforms at hyperscale.

leaders.name: Aisha Bello
leaders.bio: Ran the SOC for a Fortune 50 retailer through three breach events.

leaders.name: Jonas Lindqvist
leaders.bio: Adversary emulation lead, ex-government red team.

leaders.name: David Reinhart
leaders.bio: Led IR for over 400 enterprise breaches across 40+ countries.

storySection.heading: A decade of defending the enterprises others can't.

milestones.title: Founded in Dallas, TX
milestones.body: Two CISOs and an offensive security team set out to build the firm they wished existed.

milestones.title: Launched Sentinel SOC
milestones.body: Opened our first 24/7 follow-the-sun managed detection and response center.

milestones.title: Global expansion
milestones.body: Offices in London, Singapore, Toronto and Sao Paulo. 600+ practitioners.

milestones.title: Sentinel AI launches
milestones.body: First-to-market AI security practice covering NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act.

milestones.title: 1,800+ enterprise clients
milestones.body: Trusted by global financial, energy, healthcare and government organizations.

careers.heading: Work alongside the best in the industry.
careers.description: We're hiring engineers, analysts, consultants and researchers across the globe. If you'd enjoy defending something that matters, we'd love to meet you.

metadata.title: Cybersecurity Services
metadata.description: Sentinel's end-to-end cybersecurity services — MDR/XDR, cloud security, identity, offensive security, incident response, and GRC advisory.

hero.description: Sentinel's services span strategy, engineering, and 24/7 operations — delivered by senior practitioners with decades of frontline experience.

metadata.title: Cybersecurity Solutions
metadata.description: Flagship cybersecurity solutions from Sentinel — zero trust, SOC modernization, data protection, OT security, AI/LLM security, and application security.

hero.description: Six flagship solutions, each delivered as a complete program — strategy, architecture, engineering, and operations under one roof.

metadata.title: Case Studies
metadata.description: How global enterprises across financial services, energy, healthcare, manufacturing and technology partnered with Sentinel to defend what matters.

hero.description: A selection of recent Sentinel engagements across financial services, energy, healthcare, manufacturing and technology.

metadata.title: Contact Sentinel
metadata.description: Talk to Sentinel about a security program, an active incident or a partnership. Response within one business hour. 24/7 incident hotline.

hero.description: Fill out the form below or reach us directly. A senior practitioner will respond within one business hour.

channels.title: General inquiries
channels.desc: For new programs, RFPs and partnerships.

channels.title: Offices
channels.desc: Dallas · London · Singapore · Toronto · Sao Paulo

sla.title: SLA
sla.description: Response within one business hour. Incident hotline answered 24/7/365 with a one-hour onsite SLA for retainer clients.
